_comment: Active research state for Auto Audio Depth Estimation - 2026-July RayDPT-validation phase (FRESH RESET). June improvement phase (champion composite ~2.03) is archived on branch 2026-June-RayDPT-improvement. This phase restarts from the ORIGINAL RayDPT baseline (f677b0f, 5ch) with TWO changes: (1) LOSS FIX - coarse-layout & low-pass loss TARGETS now use MASK-WEIGHTED pooling (old avg-pool/blur diluted the target with invalid gt=0 pixels); (2) selection composite ABS_REL weight reduced (effective 0.75 -> 0.35) since abs_rel is gameable and varies most. compute_errors (eval metric) unchanged. State files: out/results.tsv, out/hypothesis.tsv, out/hypothesis_details.tsv, studies.json; helper utils/research.py.
reset_note: Fresh from original baseline f677b0f + mask-weighted coarse/low loss targets + composite abs_rel weight 0.75->0.35.
metric: composite (selection) = rmse/1.6 + (1-d1)/0.46 + 0.35*abs_rel  (lower better; RMSE+d1 dominate; abs_rel de-weighted)

active_study.general_hypothesis: Establish the fresh baseline: original RayDPT (5ch [logL,logR,ILD,cosIPD,sinIPD] + flip-aug) with the CORRECTED coarse/low-pass loss targets (mask-weighted) and the composite selection (abs_rel weight 0.35), to anchor the 2026-July validation phase.
active_study.detailed_hypothesis: Run the reset baseline train.py unchanged; record its metrics as the new baseline. Then re-validate whether the June findings (bf16/bs32/lr/EMA, coarse/geometry attention, gated skips, multi-res STFT, coherence, TTA) still hold under the corrected loss + de-weighted-abs_rel selection.
active_study.experiment_note: E0: python train.py --mode train (defaults: in_ch=5, flip_aug, no TTA).
active_study.decision_rule: Record the baseline. Then follow program.md's workflow. The corrected coarse/low targets especially affect the coarse-layout loss that the geometry/coarse studies leaned on, so June conclusions may shift. Never crown on <2-3 draws.

backlog.idea: Re-validate the June optimisation envelope under the fixed loss: bf16 AMP + bs32 + lr4e-4 + warmup-cosine + EMA0.995.
Re-validate the June representation wins: multi-res STFT (fine-time echo delay) + interaural coherence (direct-vs-diffuse).
Drop the vestigial pix2pix encoder tail (24.44M->7.69M, provably equivalent) - re-apply early once baseline confirmed.
